reviews.review_description: One of the best VR games out there so excited for the full release

developer_response.body: Hey Smokey.001, thank you so much for the review. We're so happy you're as excited as we are for the full release! Not too long now.

reviews.review_description: Gun in hand placement needs work, but could be excellent!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback and the review TheDirector50! We're keeping a close eye on the reviews, along with the developer so any feedback is really appreciated.

After speaking to the developer this evening we wanted to let you know that hand placement can be adjusted in the menus. We hope this helps.

reviews.review_description: Hey great game. While I beat it will this game have a variety of difficulty settings? I’d love if it had say 10 levels. I’d prefer to play it a little less stressful then replay on a higher difficulty. If we had lots then I’d slowly keep coming back to play harder versions.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for your review. The full game will have 60 unique scenes, and regarding accessibility, this comes straight from the developer:

'Take a look at the Mutators in the Main Menu, they offer a variety of ways to customize the difficulty.  You can make yourself Invincible with IronHeart, make enemies die in one hit with Glass Enemies, give yourself Infinite ammo and more.  Some also increase the difficulty in a variety of ways, so youre free to play the way you want!'.

We hope this helps!

reviews.review_description:
Updated: I dunno what was up before, but I tried the full version of this game again after some updates and it works better. I put a review on the main game with my recent better experience.  

I really want to like this game. I practiced the demo, but I keep getting intermittent failed grabs, which is a disaster in a game where grabbing is everything from movement to reloading to dodging. I never had trouble in Superhot or Robo Recall
Great game, if you liked SuperHot you will love this game ! Can't wait for the full release

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review Bigmak74, thanks for recommending VENDETTA FOREVER to fans of frenetic shooters!

reviews.review_description:
I need to clear some space on my quest so I thought I'd have a quick play of this demo then delete it but no chance, this is a keeper.
Looks a bit like superhot and pistol whip but it's completely different with the grab weapon to teleport mechanic.
Levels are short but I found myself playing again and again trying to perfect my run.
I usually wait for a sale to buy games as I have a bit of a backlog but this is getting bought day one. Can't wait for the full game

This game has it all - engrossing gameplay, catchy music, and style to spare. The stages included in this demo are well structured and creative, showing a nice variety that promises well for the full game. I appreciated the scalability of the difficulty, too; the invulnerability mutator was super helpful, giving me the chance to familiarize myself with a level before tackling it for real. And you really do feel absurdly bad*ss when you've got the rhythm of a stage, and you're cutting through enemies like a hot knife through butter. Looking forward to playing more!

developer_response.body: We love to hear this! We know that MeatSpace Interactive worked incredibly hard on all aspects of the demo and can't wait to show the sheer variety of gameplay mechanics in the full release. They were particularly keen on making the player feel awesome at every opportunity, which seems to have worked for you :-) Can't wait to share more with you!

reviews.review_description:
Wow these guys know how to make a VR game. It controls so smoothly. Even the tutorial felt good to go through. Very snappy and incredibly replayable.

There's a bit of autoaim with the guns and knives, but it's just the right amount of it so it removes the frustrating parts but still feels like you're the one pulling off the shots.

This will easily be one of the most recommended VR games. Will get it when it's released. Protip: Make sure to go through the advanced tutorial.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 star review! We're really happy to hear you've been enjoying VENDETTA FOREVER, and completely agree that the advanced tutorial is definitely something players should check out.

reviews.review_title: Great Idea, but grab is a bit clunky.
reviews.review_description: Superhot meets Pistol Whip....  Great idea. However, the core dynamic is grab to move and I am finding it erratic. Works only 50% of the time.  Fix it, and the game will be awesome!

developer_response.body: Hey The_Richelieu, thanks for your review and for the comparison with such iconic games. We appreciate your feedback regarding the LO-KILL-MOTION mechanic, but haven't experienced this ourselves. Here's a few things we could think of that might explain these issues. When a green reticule appears it means the weapon will be pulled towards you, whereas a blue reticule means you teleport to the weapon. Time slows when you line up to grab a blue/teleport weapon. We hope this helps you and other players who might be experiencing similar issues.

reviews.review_description: I died a bunch of times on the first level, but once I got it, it’s loads of fast paced fun. The levels have some clever design, way more variety than pistol whip!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review rhymeandreason8, we really appreciate your comment about clever design, the developer will be so happy to hear this!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game! Very fast paced!

developer_response.body: Hey Mmarzel, thanks for the 5 stars! We're so glad you've been enjoying the VENDETTA FOREVER demo, we wanted it to be all about cutting to the good part, so hearing you describe it as fast paced is great :-)

reviews.review_title: ¡Makes Me Feel Like An Action Hero!
reviews.review_description: This demo is fire! I had a chance to play it recently and made a video about it on Youtube. It was a lot of fun! I can't wait for the full thing to be released. It's all action from the intro to the end and wastes no time to get to the action. Also, a good workout!!!! If you loved Superhot, you will loooooove this

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review OneMoreBenjamin! We loved that you picked up on the developer's intention to cut straight to the action with VENDETTA FOREVER. We're so happy you're as excited for launch as we are. We'll try and find your video now :-)

reviews.review_title: Great reimagining of Bang Bang Slice
reviews.review_description:
Became a big fan of the dev the moment I played bang bang slice.
Ive had fun trying to compete for the speed run competition on nDreams discord last weekend and loved it even more than when I initially tried the demo (apologies for the late review.....Indidnt know you could review demos XD)

But the demo gives you a chance to have a taste of that the full game will offer (including the mutations/modifiers that can make the game easier or harder)

Now only if I can get the smooth motion down.....maybe I can compete with the best of the speed runners XD

Im still take about 2 seconds longer of the top players.....on Neon Vengence level.

Cant wait for the full game to release!

developer_response.body: Hey Burntbreadman, great to see you here :-) Thank you so much for the review, we really appreciate you following the dev from Bang Bang Slice to VENDETTA FOREVER, and for taking part in the speedrun competition - the top times were insane, but you weren't far off with your 7 seconds. We're glad you're as excited for the full release as we are!

reviews.review_description: Loved Bang Bang Slice and have replayed it in its entirety about 5 times. Just the five level demo is insanely fun and I have replayed it like 10 times. Everything about it is satisfying and fun and the teleport mechanic is really cool. Will 100% but this when it comes out and highly suggest it!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! This kind of feedback is why we make games <3

reviews.review_description: I’ve played through the demo for Vendetta Forever a few times now, and it takes the concept that Superhot experimented with and takes this to another level. On a whole, it is much more challenging and requires a lot more quick improvisation each time you are pulled to a new location. There is a ton of variety to the weapons and stages in a demo that offers a significant amount of play time! Will probably look to eventually buy this one when it goes on sale!

IM quite an older gamer who grew up on NES & ARCADES. I will upgrade to Q3 but graphics aren't issue hen playing  light gun & rail shooter genre. This gets way more chaotic than TIGER BLADE, DEAD SECOND & other shooters w/limited control but has a unique & fresh take on movement.  I repeatedly played 1st 3 levels of demo, thers at least 1 (few?) More but kept tryng to beat my score. I LOVE THIS GENRE, LOVE TO SEE IT UPGRADED/REIMAGINED & constantly play this!!

reviews.review_title: Will definitely buy when it comes out
reviews.review_description:
I don't usually write reviews on games but this one is just amazing.
I'm not usully a very big fan of rail shootersbut this one is brilliant. The levels have variety and it makes you feel like John Wick. The katanas do feel a bit weird. I'd like the opurtunity to cut multiple times before the enemy dissapears. Honestly a really good game and I'm excited to see what happens with the full game. The Soundtrack is also so good.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five star review Genericguy! We're so happy to hear you enjoyed the demo and the variety it provides, but we can't wait to show you the full game, which we know offers much more in terms of scenes, weapons and more.

reviews.review_description: I had so much fun that I was drenched in sweat. I'm very curious about the game itself. I hope there's a way to continue the level even if you miss grabbing a weapon and they all disappear. That's the only reason it's not 5 stars for me.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we're glad you're having fun with VENDETTA FOREVER. This comes straight from the dev, "weapons will despawn about 20 seconds after they are dropped, so the element of speed is important to continue moving forward.  Try to grab weapons as soon as they're dropped by enemies, you can always undo and redo teleports to move around while holding your weapons!"

reviews.review_description: That's Bang Bang Slice (which I already really liked), just more polished and refined. Looking forward to the full version!

developer_response.body: We're so glad you picked up on this, VENDETTA FOREVER is from the developer of Bang Bang Slice! Thank you for leaving a review so soon after release.

reviews.review_title: Most fun I’ve had in VR!
reviews.review_description:
This is honestly the most engaging and fun gaming experience I’ve had so far in VR! I love the movement mechanic and the whole flow makes me feel so powerful and bad@$$. Huge props to the dev team. Highly recommend giving this demo a shot! 

That said, be sure to do all the tutorials and play around with the practice range if you’re struggling with any aspects of the gameplay—I definitely should have done those before jumping straight in. 

Overall, A+

developer_response.body:
Hey aotu, thank you for the review! We're so glad VENDETTA FOREVER has had the intended effect, I know the developer wants players to feel like they're part of their very own action movie.

We agree about doing the tutorials and utilising the practice range, even using the mutators as you get to grips with the game.
